sourceTitle: Wikipedia: List of universities and colleges in Syria
transforms: Reviewed the remaining governorate/locality conflict for Arab Academy for E-Businesses.
Used the Wikipedia-listed Aleppo governorate as the canonical governorate.
Normalized the locality to Aleppo because the current schema requires a locality and no more precise approved locality is available.
reviewNotes: This review only resolves the malformed Damascus / Aleppo Governorate combination. More precise campus or contact locations should be added later only after source approval.
